key.name: app-configs
key.description: Dictionary mapping Application Name to (Enabled (bool), Duration (int)). Duration is in seconds.

key.name: duration-low
key.description: Display duration in seconds for Low priority notifications.

key.name: duration-normal
key.description: Display duration in seconds for Normal priority notifications.

key.name: duration-critical
key.description: Display duration in seconds for Critical priority notifications. 0 means persistent until dismissed.
